Metadata.defaultDescription: كتب تعاونية على نمط ويكيبيديا عن شخصيات تاريخية. سجّل لإنشاء الكتب وتحريرها.

Home.title: كتب عن شخصيات تاريخية
Home.intro: OpenBook مكتبة على نمط الويكي: يمكن لأي شخص التسجيل وبدء كتاب عن شخصية تاريخية والتعاون عبر المراجعات والسجل—مثل ويكيبيديا، مع التركيز على السير.
Home.searchPlaceholder: ابحث بالشخص أو العنوان أو الوسوم أو الرابط…
Home.filterHint: خيارات الدولة واللغة من الكتب في المكتبة. العمر/الجمهور يستخدم القائمة المعيارية لكل كتاب.
Home.noBooksYet: لا كتب بعد. سجّل الدخول وأنشئ الأول.

Auth.signInBlurbGoogle: سجّل الدخول باستخدام Google أو البريد وكلمة المرور التي سجّلت بها.
Auth.signInBlurbEmail: استخدم البريد وكلمة المرور التي سجّلت بها.

BookLanguageEdit.intro: Chapters without a title and body in this language stay dimmed here and are hidden from readers when they view the book in this language. Use each row to open the editor for that chapter.

CreateBook.title: New book
CreateBook.blurb: Create a collaborative biography-style book. You can add sections and revisions after saving.

AutoBook.title: Auto book (local AI)
AutoBook.blurb: Generate a draft book in your browser with WebLLM. Publishing still runs on the server.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.intro: Control how you hear about activity across OpenBook.
Settings.digestHint: Get in-app notifications for new books and edits on books you are not watching. Books you watch always notify you directly.

ProfileReports.title: Your reports
ProfileReports.empty: You have not submitted any reports.

ProfileWatches.title: Watched books
ProfileWatches.empty: You are not watching any books.

ReportForm.title: Report content
ReportForm.hint: Describe the problem (minimum 10 characters). Moderators will review.

Errors.signInForReferences: You must be signed in to fetch references.
Errors.reportTooShort: Please describe the issue (at least 10 characters).
Errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
Errors.figurePick: Use “Check name”, choose a matching person, then “Use selected person” — or restore the original figure name when editing.
Errors.figurePickStale: Figure choice no longer matches catalog search. Run Check name again and pick again.
Errors.countryTooLong: Country / region must be 255 characters or fewer.
Errors.titleFigureRequired: Title and historical figure name are required.
Errors.slugDerive: Could not derive a URL slug from the title and figure name.
Errors.slugReserved: That URL slug is reserved. Choose another.
Errors.intendedAgesRequired: Intended ages or audience is required (who should be able to read this book?).
Errors.intendedAgesInvalid: Choose a valid age / audience from the list.
Errors.primaryLanguageFromBook: Choose a valid primary language from this book’s languages.
Errors.slugExists: A book with this URL slug already exists.
Errors.wizardSectionRange: This draft needs between 1 and {max} sections.
Errors.chapterNeedsBody: Each chapter needs a title, slug, and non-empty body.
Errors.anotherSlug: Another book already uses this URL slug.
Errors.slugInUse: That URL slug is already in use.
Errors.languageAlreadyOnBook: That language is already on this book.
Errors.sectionExists: A section with this URL slug already exists in this book.
Errors.sectionOrderMismatch: Section list does not match this book.
Errors.invalidSectionOrder: Invalid or duplicate section in order.
Errors.onlyCreatorWizard: Only the book creator can use the auto wizard on this book.
Errors.onlyCreatorLoadWizard: Only the book creator can load wizard data for this book.
Errors.onlyCreatorRunWizard: Only the book creator can run the wizard on this book.
Errors.noValidNewSections: No valid new sections (duplicates, reserved slugs, or empty titles were skipped).
Errors.cannotDeleteOnlySection: You cannot delete the only section. Add another section first, then delete this one.
Errors.deleteTitleMismatch: The title you typed does not match this book. Enter the exact book title to confirm deletion.
Errors.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most {max} characters.
Errors.onlyStewardResolve: Only Steward-tier contributors or site administrators can resolve reports.
Errors.figureVerifyFailed: Could not load name suggestions. Try again.

AutoWizard.confirmFigure: Confirm the historical figure with Check name → pick → Use selected person.
AutoWizard.webgpu: WebGPU is not available. Use a recent Chrome or Edge on desktop with a capable GPU.
AutoWizard.lifeEventsShort: The model did not produce enough life-event notes. Open the raw response below and try again.
AutoWizard.tocBad: The model did not return usable TOC rows. Check raw responses below.
AutoWizard.emptyChapter: The model returned empty text for this chapter.
AutoWizard.intendedAgesHint: Used for filters and for local AI (reading level and tone).
AutoWizard.primaryLanguageHint: Add more languages from the book’s edit page after publishing.
AutoWizard.guidePromptPh: e.g. Focus on scientific work; keep personal life brief; emphasize primary sources where possible.
AutoWizard.introCheckbox: AI-drafted Introduction before the generated chapters.
AutoWizard.targetChaptersHint: At least {min}; no fixed max. Very large counts may hit the model or your revision rate limit. Optional Introduction is extra.
AutoWizard.targetPagesHint: Rough editorial hint for the model (~{wordsPerPage} words/page estimate), not real pagination.
AutoWizard.referenceSnippets: Fetch reference snippets (Wikipedia, Wikidata, etc.) per chapter
AutoWizard.startHint: Start stays disabled until the figure shows ✓ (Check name → pick → Use selected person).
AutoWizard.notSavedUntilPublish: Not saved until you publish the book below.
AutoWizard.draftBrowserOnly: Draft is only in your browser. Publish to create the book on the server.
AutoWizard.loadingModel: Loading WebLLM — Llama 3.1 8B (first run may download several GB)…
AutoWizard.step1Progress: Step 1 of 2: outlining important life events…
AutoWizard.step2Progress: Step 2 of 2: building table of contents…

ChapterAi.title: AI draft from references
ChapterAi.webgpu: WebGPU is not available. Use a recent Chrome or Edge on desktop with a capable GPU.
ChapterAi.replaceConfirm: Replace the current editor content with the generated draft? (You can still cancel before publishing.)
ChapterAi.fetchingSnippets: Fetching snippets from Wikipedia, Wikidata, Open Library, Grokipedia…
ChapterAi.noSnippets: No encyclopedia/catalog snippets matched; drafting from book context only…
ChapterAi.emptyModel: The model returned empty text. Try again or shorten book context.
ChapterAi.emphasisHint: e.g. Emphasize her 1920s experiments; one line per topic helps lookup (names, places, works) on Wikipedia, Open Library, or Grokipedia.
ChapterAi.useReferences: Use Wikipedia, Wikidata, Open Library, and Grokipedia snippets when drafting

ChapterTranslate.title: Translate body (local AI)
ChapterTranslate.webgpu: WebGPU is not available. Use a recent Chrome or Edge on desktop with a capable GPU.
ChapterTranslate.replaceConfirm: Replace the current editor content with the translation? (You can still cancel before publishing.)
ChapterTranslate.emptyModel: The model returned empty text. Try again or shorten the source chapter.

BookLocalizedTitle.heading: Book title
BookLocalizedTitle.hint: This title is shown to readers when they view the book in this language.
BookLocalizedTitle.editAria: Edit book title for this language

AdminDelete.title: Delete book (admin)
AdminDelete.warning: This permanently deletes the book, all sections, revisions, and related records.
AdminDelete.confirmLabel: Type the book title to confirm

FigureField.pickHint: Pick a person below, then “Use selected person”.
FigureField.noMatches: No matches. Try a different spelling or add more context.
